kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Potter goes with Aldric or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Aldric.
Weaver goes with neither 7 coins nor 9 coins.
Cooper goes with at least two of Cedric, Bridgegate, and 3 coins.
Weaver goes with Southgate if and only if Oldwall does not go with 9 coins.
Between Beatrix and Wulfric, one goes with Oldwall and the other with Riverside.
Between Mason and 3 coins, one goes with Oldwall and the other with Southgate.
At most one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the Hill Ward.
Exactly one of these is true: Aldric goes with 5 coins; Edmund goes with Oldwall; Millpond goes with 11 coins.
Edmund goes with exactly two of Carpenter, Southgate, and 11 coins.
Aldric's levy is higher than both the Carpenter and the artisan in Highrow.
Exactly three of (the members of the South Side, Wulfric, and the artisan with 3 coins) belong to the Ironmongers' Guild.
The Weaver's levy is lower than both Edmund and the artisan in Oldwall.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either Pike goes with Boone or someone in the Catfish Family goes with Boone.
Trout goes with neither 14 lb nor 16 lb.
Crappie goes with at least two of Dale, Cedarmere, and 10 lb.
Trout goes with Willowmere if and only if Mossbank does not go with 16 lb.
Between Cody and Wade, one goes with Mossbank and the other with Stillwater.
Between Perch and 10 lb, one goes with Mossbank and the other with Willowmere.
At most one member of the Pike Family is in the West Watershed.
Exactly one of these is true: Boone goes with 12 lb; Esther goes with Mossbank; Grayreach goes with 18 lb.
Esther goes with exactly two of Carp, Willowmere, and 18 lb.
Boone's weight is higher than both the angler who landed the Carp and the angler at Foxglen.
Exactly three of (the members of the Lowland Basin, Wade, and the catch with 10 lb) belong to the Pike Family.
The angler who landed the Trout's weight is lower than both Esther and the angler at Mossbank.
